reference: Hello, I am twenty-four years old. I have been very emotional lately, and all I have wanted to do is eat and lie in bed, but I only get two hours of sleep every night. My mind just races. I do not want to be bothered with anything or anyone. I find myself exhausted when I come home from work because I have to try to smile and act like I am fine. I do not feel like myself anymore. I was on depression medication before, which seemed to help a little, but I got off them two years ago. This has been going on for about a month. I had a panic attack an hour ago, and it took me a while to finally calm down. I am calling the doctor on Monday, but I wanted to see if you could help me now.
text: Hello, I am 24 years old, I have been very emotional lately, and all I have wanted to do is sleep in my own bed, but I only get 2 hours of sleep every night, and my mind just races. I do not want to be bothered with anything or anyone. I find myself exhausted when I come home from work because I have to try to smile and act like I am fine. I do not feel like myself anymore. I was on depression medication before, which seemed to help a little, but I got off them 2 years ago. This has been going on for about a month. I had a panic attack an hour ago, and it took me a while to finally calm down. I am calling the doctor on Monday, but I wanted to see if he could help me now.
